Bash(git commit -m "docs: comprehensive README update with security features and setup guide

Major improvements to README:

## What''s New
- Added detailed security features section highlighting all protections
- Complete step-by-step installation with DOCKER_GID configuration
- Prerequisites section for clarity
- File permissions instructions (chown 1001:1001)
- Links to all documentation (SETUP_COMPLETE.md, SECURITY.md, etc.)

## Sections Added
- Security Features: Authentication, command injection protection, path traversal prevention
- Troubleshooting: Common issues with quick fixes (docker permissions, file explorer, login)
- Documentation: Links to all comprehensive guides
- Security Notice: Warning about changing default password

## Key Information Highlighted
- Docker socket GID matching requirement
- Non-root container execution (UID 1001)
- Server-side session management
- Security headers and input validation

This makes it much easier for new users to set up correctly on first try.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>")
